title: Setting Up Utilities Without Overpaying
summary: Avoid default-plan traps in power, internet, and essential services.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: A surprisingly high bill arrives before you know your plan type.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: Utilities feel fixed and non-negotiable when they are not.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Default plans are convenience products, not value products.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Compare providers once, set calendar reminders for annual checks, and record account numbers in one secure place.

Check usage versus supply charges to avoid false savings assumptions.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find home and utility service touchpoints near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Cooking 5 Meals You'll Actually Eat - stable routines make budgets sustainable.
